P

parallel - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar.ProxyRegistrarSettings
Specifies whether to proxy in parallel or sequentially.

proxyOnUnregistered - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar.ProxyRegistrarSettings
Proxy the request to the 'To' header instead of issuing a 404 Not Found error.
ProxyRegistrar - Class in org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar

ProxyRegistrarServlet - Class in org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar
This class implements an example B2BUA with transfer capabilities.

proxyTimeout - Variable in class org.vorpal.blade.services.proxy.registrar.ProxyRegistrarSettings
Sets the overall proxy timeout in seconds.
